title: AWS Step Functions (Orchestration)
description: Master AWS Step Functions for orchestrating complex, long-running serverless workflows. Architect robust workflows with built-in retry logic, error handling, and state management to avoid "Lambda Spaghetti."
objectives: Master AWS Step Functions for orchestrating complex, long-running serverless workflows.
Architect robust workflows with built-in retry logic, error handling, and state management to avoid "Lambda Spaghetti."
